description: Conventions specific to azents Python source. Read the referenced body before applying.
paths:
  - python/apps/azents/**

# azents Conventions

Conventions for `python/apps/azents/` only. Generic Python rules live in `python-conventions.md`.

<!-- BEGIN_TABLE: generated by scripts/generate-conventions-index.py, edits inside will be overwritten -->

| Convention | File |
| --- | --- |
| Boolean column and field names in azents do NOT take an `is_` prefix — `enabled`, `available`, `archived` (not `is_enabled`, `is_available`, `is_archived`). | [boolean-no-is-prefix](../conventions/python-azents/boolean-no-is-prefix.md) |
| In azents API code, do not raise HTTPException for 5xx responses — let unexpected/internal failures propagate so FastAPI/server error handling owns 500s, and never use gateway statuses like 502/503/504 for Azents product API failures. | [no-explicit-5xx-http-exception](../conventions/python-azents/no-explicit-5xx-http-exception.md) |
| In azents RDB models, assign SQLAlchemy constraints and indexes to named class constants before listing them in `__table_args__` so schema objects are reusable and reviewable. | [rdb-index-constants](../conventions/python-azents/rdb-index-constants.md) |

<!-- END_TABLE -->
